revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '.navbox { /* Navbox container style */ box-sizing: border-box; border: 1px solid #a2a9b1; width: 100%; clear: both; font-size: 88%; text-align: center; padding: 1px; margin: 1em auto 0; /* Prevent preceding content from clinging to navboxes */ } .navbox .navbox { margin-top: 0; /* No top margin for nested navboxes */ } .navbox + .navbox { margin-top: -1px; /* Single pixel border between adjacent navbo...'

Protected "[[Module:Navbox/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]], match parent ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
pp small=y
move the navbar styles here
shorten css
css from https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=MediaWiki:Common.css&oldid=1052385380
add .navbox-styles
remove after transclusions
+.navbox-styles
fail
first line
add two more todos
restore transparency, to avoid recolouring succession box headers
replace with inherit
Reverted [[WP:AGF|good faith]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Neveselbert|Neveselbert]] ([[User talk:Neveselbert|talk]])
cmt out for now
remove qualifications on th - this will remove styling from "hand-crafted" navboxes, but there's no other elegant way to deal with it. see talk page
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Navbox/styles.css]]: importing for the list. This is a canonical list of Shrines to work with
move this to the specific template
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Navbox/styles.css]]
move this to the specific template
move this to the specific template

move this to the specific template
move this to the specific template

move this to the specific template

1 revision imported: Importing [[Template:Months]] and associated templates to attempt to edit and merge into [[Template:Japanese_Lunisolar_Calendar]]
move this to the specific template
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Navbox/styles.css]]
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
